display.purpose: Brand name and page-level headings. One per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Section titles, card headings, daily prompts.

body.purpose: Chat messages, descriptions, explanatory text. Capped at 65ch.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions. Calm deceleration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Olive Branch green on warm parchment.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.45 0.12 145); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 75); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.45 0.12 145 / 0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions. Oat Milk background with Espresso text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); padding: 8px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); height: 36px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.45 0.12 145 / 0.5); }

components.name: Suggestion Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped suggestion prompts in chat. Tappable, horizontally scrollable.
components.css: .ds-chip { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); padding: 6px 14px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip:hover { background: oklch(0.9 0.02 75); } .ds-chip:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.45 0.12 145 / 0.5); }

components.name: Chat Input
components.description: Full-width pill input for typing Spanish messages.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; width: 100%; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5 0.02 50); } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.45 0.12 145 / 0.2); }

components.name: User Chat Bubble
components.description: Right-aligned user message in Olive Branch green. Squared bottom-right corner.
components.css: .ds-bubble-user { background: oklch(0.45 0.12 145); color: oklch(0.99 0.005 75); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: 16px 16px 4px 16px; max-width: 85%; margin-left: auto; }

components.name: Bot Chat Bubble
components.description: Left-aligned bot response in Oat Milk. Squared bottom-left corner.
components.html: Estoy muy bien, gracias! Y tu, que tal?
components.css: .ds-bubble-bot { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 4px; max-width: 85%; }

components.name: Topic Card
components.description: Tappable topic selection card on the dashboard. Emoji + title + subtitle.
components.css: .ds-topic-card { background: oklch(0.99 0.005 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); padding: 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.02 75); border-radius: 16px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 4px; text-align: left; transition: background 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 0.1s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-topic-card:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75 / 0.5); } .ds-topic-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-topic-emoji { font-size: 1.5rem; } .ds-topic-title { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-topic-sub { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.5 0.02 50); }

components.name: Tab Navigation
components.description: Pill-shaped segment control for Speak/Practice tabs.
components.css: .ds-tabs { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 75); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 3px; display: inline-flex; gap: 2px; } .ds-tab { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.5 0.02 50); padding: 6px 16px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); } .ds-tab-active { background: oklch(0.99 0.005 75); color: oklch(0.25 0.02 50); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08); }

narrative.overview:
Hablaba feels like a warm kitchen in the morning: unhurried light through the window, a cup of something warm in your hands, a child nearby. Everything is within reach. Nothing demands attention; things are simply there when you need them. The palette is drawn from natural materials: herbs, honey, linen, clay, wood.

This is not a classroom. There are no scoreboards, no badges, no mascots bouncing for attention. The interface recedes so the language can come forward. Spanish appears naturally, the way it would on a jar in a market or a note on the fridge, not inside flashcard boxes or drill grids.
keyCharacteristics: Warm earthy palette rooted in greens, golds, and creams
Serif brand type (Fraunces) for personality, sans (DM Sans) for clarity
Flat surfaces with tonal layering; no drop shadows
Touch targets sized for one-handed use
Motion is gentle and purposeful; never performative

rules.name: The Olive Branch Rule
rules.body: Green is for doing things. If an element is not interactive or actively selected, it does not get Olive Branch. Its scarcity is what makes it trustworthy.

rules.name: The No Pure Black Rule
rules.body: Every dark value is tinted warm. #000 and #fff are prohibited. The darkest value in the system is Espresso; the lightest is Warm Parchment.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Fraunces appears in Display and Headline roles only. Body text, labels, buttons, and inputs are always DM Sans.

rules.name: The Flat Table Rule
rules.body: Nothing floats. Surfaces sit on the table. If you reach for box-shadow on a card or container, use a background-color shift instead.

dos: Do use Olive Branch exclusively for interactive elements and active states.
Do vary spacing between sections for visual rhythm.
Do show Spanish in natural context: full sentences, routine phrases, conversational fragments.
Do ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44px.
Do test contrast ratios on every Oat Milk / Soft Clay combination.
donts: Don't use gamification patterns: streaks that punish, achievement badges, leaderboards, XP counters, progress bars.
Don't make the interface feel like courseware: numbered lessons, locked levels, completion percentages.
Don't use cold blues, corporate grays, or dashboard-dense layouts.
Don't use box-shadows on cards or containers.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or colored side-stripe borders.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't add competing calls to action. One primary action per screen.
